pre_game.message: Hey, I’m C. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting, isn’t it? I’m just trying to stay relaxed before things kick off—how are you feeling about the game?
Hey C, I'm G. It’s definitely a bit tense, but I’m feeling pretty focused—I’ve got people back home I’m doing this for, so I’m ready to get started. How are you holding up?
I’m doing okay, just trying to stay steady. I totally get that—I’ve got people I’m looking out for too, which definitely ups the stakes.
Glad to hear I'm not the only one with that drive. It definitely makes it more than just a game—do you have a strategy yet for how to handle the prize pool?
I’m still weighing my options, honestly. I’d love for us to find a way to cooperate so we all actually walk away with something—what about you, any specific plan?
I’m thinking along the same lines—if we can get everyone on board with a fair split, it’d be ideal. I just hope everyone else feels the same way.
That’s the real challenge, isn't it? Getting ten strangers to trust each other is tough, but I’m definitely down if we can actually pull it off.
Exactly. It’s risky, but if we can get even a few more people on the same page, it might actually work. I'm glad we're seeing eye to eye on this.
Same here. Have you managed to talk to anyone else yet who seems like they’d be open to a split?
You're actually the first person I've chatted with so far. I’m going to go circulate a bit and see if I can get a read on the others. Catch you in a bit!
Sounds like a plan, G. Let me know what you find out—I'll try to do the same. Good luck out there!
